segments.text: O Lord, the God of my salvation, I cry out before you day and night.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

footnotes: for the sons: or, of the sons
Maschil…: or, A Psalm of Heman the Ezrahite, giving instruction
heading: A Psalm of the Sons of Korah

segments.text: Let my prayer come before you; incline your ear to my cry!
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: For my soul is full of troubles, and my life draws near to Sheol.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: I am counted among those who go down to the pit; I am a man who has no strength,
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: like one set loose among the dead, like the slain that lie in the grave, whom you remember no more, and who are cut off from your hand.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have put me in the depths of the pit, in the regions dark and deep.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: Your wrath lies heavy upon me, and you overwhelm me with all your waves. Selah
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have caused my companions to shun me; you have made me a horror to them. I am shut up, and I cannot escape;
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: my eye grows dim through sorrow. Every day I call upon you, O Lord; I spread out my hands to you.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: Do you work wonders for the dead? Do the departed rise up to praise you? Selah
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: Is your steadfast love declared in the grave, or your faithfulness in Abaddon?
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: Are your wonders known in the darkness, or your righteousness in the land of forgetfulness?
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: But I, O Lord, cry to you; in the morning my prayer comes before you.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: O Lord, why do you cast my soul away? Why do you hide your face from me?
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: Afflicted and close to death from my youth up, I suffer your terrors; I am helpless.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: Your wrath has swept over me; your dreadful assaults destroy me.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: They surround me like a flood all day long; they close in on me together.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite

segments.text: You have caused my beloved and my friend to shun me; my companions have become darkness.
segments.speaker: Heman the Ezrahite
